name: Signup
code:
def Signup(user : CreateUser, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    existing_user = db.query(User).filter(user.email == User.email).first()
    if existing_user:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=400,
            detail="user already exists"
        )
    new_user = User(
        email = user.email,
        password = hash_password(user.password)
    )
    print(len(hash_password(user.password)))
    db.add(new_user)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(new_user)

    return new_user

def create_user(user: Createuser, db : Session = Depends(getdb)):
    db_user = models.User(name = user.name, age = user.age)
    db.add(db_user)

__init__
code:
def __init__(self):
        self.active_connections = {}

name: connect
code:
async def connect(self, ws:WebSocket, userid : str):
        await ws.accept()
        self.active_connections[userid] = ws

name: disconnect
code:
def disconnect(self,userid):
        del self.active_connections[userid]

name: send_to_user
code:
async def send_to_user(self, userid, message):
        ws = self.active_connections.get(userid)
        if ws:
            await ws.send_text(message)

name: broadcast
websocket_endpoint
code:
async def websocket_endpoint(ws :WebSocket, userid : str):
    await manager.connect(ws, userid)
    try:
        while True:
            data = await ws.receive_text()
            message =  json.loads(data)

            receiver = message["receiver"]
            msg = message["message"]
            await manager.send_to_user(receiver, f"{userid} = {msg}")
    except WebSocketDisconnect:
        manager.disconnect(userid)
